form_data.Idea Name: Smart Digital Health Support and Preventive Care Enablement
form_data.Idea Description:
Provides individuals with reliable and easy-to-understand health guidance and information.

Facilitates early identification of potential health issues and ensures timely referral to appropriate healthcare centers.

Minimizes unnecessary outpatient visits by enabling initial remote health assessment and screening.

Promotes preventive healthcare practices while optimizing the utilization of medical resources.
